response.objective_caption: A person wearing black sunglasses with a green sticky note reading "FAIL" on the right lens sits at a wooden table. They wear a black and white vertically striped button-down shirt and a wide necktie with a vivid floral pattern in turquoise, pink, and yellow. They hold a stemmed glass of red wine in one hand. A rounded red glass vessel rests on the table in the foreground. The background is solid black.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person wearing black sunglasses with a green sticky note reading "FAIL" on one lens sits at a wooden table, smiling to reveal a gold tooth. They wear a black and white striped button-down shirt paired with a necktie in aggressively clashing neon turquoise, hot pink, and yellow floral patterns. Harsh, direct lighting strikes their face with hard shadows and bright specular highlights, creating an unflattering flash-lit aesthetic against a swallowing black void. They hold a stemmed glass of red wine near a rounded red glass vessel. The overall composition exudes an atmosphere of unease and dread through its discordant palette, stark lighting, and absurdist details.
